name: Spa
comment: @docs setup, addPage, withSubscriptions, withLoadingView, withErrorView, onUrlChange, toApplication, Model, StackModel

values.name: addPage
values.comment: Adds a page to the SPA.
values.type: ( (IO.IO current msg -> IO.IO (Spa.Stack.Model current previous) msg) -> currentView -> view, (IO.IO previous msg -> IO.IO (Spa.Stack.Model current previous) msg) -> previousView -> view ) -> Spa.Page.Page current flags msg shared currentView -> (route -> Maybe.Maybe flags) -> Spa.Stack.Stack previousCurrent previousPrevious route msg shared previousView info -> Spa.Stack.Stack current (Spa.Stack.Model previousCurrent previousPrevious) route msg shared view info

values.name: onUrlChange
values.comment: Callback when an URL is changed.
values.type: (route -> IO.IO shared msg) -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route) -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route)

values.name: setup
values.type: (flags -> route -> Task.Task error shared) -> (Browser.Navigation.Key -> msg -> IO.IO shared msg) -> view -> (Url.Url -> route) -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route)

values.name: toApplication
values.comment: Converts the SPA to an Elm application.
values.type: (shared -> view -> Browser.Document (IO.IO (Spa.Stack.Model current previous) msg)) -> Spa.Stack.Stack current previous route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route) -> IO.Program flags (Spa.Model current previous shared route error) msg

values.name: withErrorView
values.type: (error -> Browser.Document msg) -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route) -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route)

values.name: withLoadingView
values.comment: Defines view while SPA is loading.
values.type: Browser.Document msg -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route) -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route)

values.name: withSubscriptions
values.type: (shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub (IO.IO shared msg)) -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route) -> Spa.Stack.Stack () () route msg shared view (Spa.Info flags error shared msg route)

aliases.name: Page
aliases.type: { init : shared -> flags -> ( model, IO.IO model msg ), subscriptions : Maybe.Maybe (model -> Platform.Sub.Sub (IO.IO model msg)), view : shared -> flags -> model -> view, flagsChanged : Maybe.Maybe (shared -> flags -> IO.IO model msg) }

values.name: create
values.type: (shared -> flags -> ( model, IO.IO model msg )) -> (shared -> flags -> model -> view) -> Spa.Page.Page model flags msg shared view

values.name: onFlagsChanged
values.comment: Handles changed flags without initializing again.
values.type: (shared -> flags -> IO.IO model msg) -> Spa.Page.Page model flags msg shared view -> Spa.Page.Page model flags msg shared view

values.name: withSubscriptions
values.type: (model -> Platform.Sub.Sub (IO.IO model msg)) -> Spa.Page.Page model flags msg shared view -> Spa.Page.Page model flags msg shared view
